## 📖 About Me

I'm an **AI & Machine Learning undergraduate** at Aditya Engineering College (CGPA **9.10**), with a growing track record in **full-stack and backend engineering** — REST APIs, containerized services, and multi-tenant architectures built to production standards rather than tutorial standards.

Over the past year I completed intensive **Full-Stack Development training** at Technical Hub Pvt Ltd, covering frontend, backend, database integration, and deployment workflows end-to-end. That foundation now shows up in projects that emphasize **correctness under load** (payment state machines, tenant isolation, JWT/RBAC) as much as clean UI.

I'm drawn to **system design, cloud computing, and applied ML** — and I like projects where those three intersect: an LLM-powered platform, a transaction-safe payment gateway, a multi-tenant SaaS backend.

<br/>
